title: ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. orthophyllum
intro: Ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. orthophyllum, also known as the Autumn Bellflower, is a perennial plant in the Hyacinth family, characterized by its bell-shaped flowers and sword-shaped leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Ornithogalum umbellatum subsp. orthophyllum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as coughs and congestion, and its ability to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
